---
title: "Introduction to Omeka S"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
    toc_float: false
---

This is a short workshop which will introduce you to Omeka S, a web
platform for building and publishing digital humanities collections.

Here are the topics we'll cover:

1. [Omeka S basic concepts](notebooks/01_basic_concepts.html)
2. [Logging in](notebooks/02_logging_in.html)
3. [Items](notebooks/03_items.html)
4. [Editing items](notebooks/04_edit_items.html)
5. [Linking items](notebooks/05_linking_items.html)
6. [Adding items](notebooks/06_add_items.html)
7. [Creating a site](notebooks/07_create_a_site.html)
8. [Creating a map](notebooks/08_create_a_map.html)
9. [Site navigation](notebooks/09_site_navigation.html)


## Trainers

* Mike Lynch
* Xinwei Luo

## Course pre-requisites and setup requirements

Laptop and login to the Omeka S instance

## Venue

CG2 Moore Theological College, Level 5, Meeting Room 502

## Schedule

Monday March 9, 1-2:30pm
